# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### China Achieves Breakthrough in Nuclear Fusion Superconducting Magnets
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/china-nuclear-fusion-superconducting-magnet-breakthrough
- Summary: China completes the world's largest fusion reactor superconducting magnet — a 582-ton toroidal field coil — and tests a fully domestically produced high-temperature superconducting solenoid at internationally leading performance levels.
